item.description: Get to know all 25 mid-major conferences in men's and women's Division I college basketball, before March Madness is upon us.

item.title: MLB's 1st Woman Ump Jen Pawol Works Spring Training, But No Permanent Role
item.description: Jen Pawol will at spring training for the third straight year, but did not get one of the permanent staff openings.

item.title: 2026 NCAA Tournament Projections: UCLA, Ohio State Squarely On the Bubble
item.description: FOX Sports' bracket forecaster Mike DeCourcy offers up his latest men's NCAA Tournament projections.
